item_name: Practice 30:2 CPR on a training manikin completion note
prompt:
A process-specific completion note for practicing 30:2 CPR on a training manikin, shown as a skills check sheet beside a CPR torso manikin, disposable practice barrier, and a clean training mat. The note should indicate the drill was completed successfully, with simple rhythm markers and compression-breath cycle diagrams that make the subject unmistakably first-aid training, without any readable text.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a grounded near-future health-training aesthetic: soft indoor lighting, realistic paper, vinyl, and plastic textures, no logos, no readable labels, and no identifiable faces. Keep the form centered and the equipment clearly visible but uncluttered for a strong DSPACE instructional artifact.
